response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning well with cloud and GenAI delivery. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of leading AI-driven solutions in production for 8+ years or deep expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS), relevant to enterprise integration.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing familiarity with agentic workflows.
Proven technical leadership in mentoring, tooling development, and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: No explicit mention of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or designing RAG architectures/vector databases.
Lacks evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or stakeholder management for AI projects.
Preferred qualifications (e.g., multi-agent systems, LLM metrics) are not clearly addressed in the resume.
